title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates family as a Category Manager in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates:
Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates!
